descriptions.text: Power Guy World is a 30 exit SMW romhack created by LucasMegaStriker as a tribute to the Vtuber "Power Guy".

Power Guy is a video game character, who together with his dog Merf, live in a small computer, playing games all day. But then, an evil group of hackers broke into their home and kidnapped Merf! Now it's up to Power Guy to save his best friend by getting into the world of the internet!
